fields.title: memory: fail load on unrepaired summary/content duplicates
fields.description: After existing persisted memories are repaired to have distinct summary hooks, tighten tau memory loading so summary==content entries fail fast instead of being accepted as legacy state forever.
fields.design: Use the new repair surfacing to clean current stores first. Then add strict load-time validation for summary/content distinctness in parsed JSONL entries, keeping the error message actionable by listing offending ids/scopes. Do not reintroduce auto-summary fallbacks.
